clean_body: | | | | | I’m sure you’ll see a lot of emails today from people like me - Democrats and progressives running for elected office - and a lot of them will sound more or less the same: We value Dr. King’s moving words, his tireless dedication to equality, and his love of country. Just because you read words like that often today doesn’t make them any less true. They are. Dr. King was a uniquely American leader unwaveringly dedicated to bending the moral arc of history towards justice. But neither can we deny that too many in our country - today \- are trying to bend the arc of history away towards inequality and oppression. While a few Republicans like Liz Cheney, Adam Kinzinger and others deeply care about the ongoing threats to American democracy, too many - including my opponent Ronny Jackson \- are in Donald Trump’s anti-democratic authoritarian death-grip.The only way out is to organize and elect more small-d democrats, among whom I count myself a proud member. And while this is the point of the email when I usually ask for a small donation, that’s for tomorrow.Today, I think Dr. King’s legacy is best honored if I ask for your strength, your time, and your talent to volunteer for my campaign in service of American democracy. So please click below to make phone calls, knock on doors, or organize others.Thank you, Kathleen Brown Candidate for Congress (D),Texas 13th district. | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | Copyright (C) 2022 Kathleen for Congress. All rights reserved.

body:

Hey — it's Beto's

We're building the biggest organizing program Texas has ever seen, and by

Hope you'll join us,

Katherine Fischer

name: Admiral's Report
subject: quick update from the campaign trail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40780630/325915135/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjI3ZGI5Mi1mMTc3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BG47oZkGLOneu3ZQtDGPlooOvSPLyj2F068iVuBPKQk=&emci=0357e0dd-0777-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=6f27db92-f177-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=6371843)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40780633/325915136/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjI3ZGI5Mi1mMTc3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BG47oZkGLOneu3ZQtDGPlooOvSPLyj2F068iVuBPKQk=&emci=0357e0dd-0777-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=6f27db92-f177-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=6371843)
Hello,
We have been super busy on the campaign trail! Here’s a quick update on what we’ve been up to, some future events, and suggestions on what you can do to help accelerate Senator Grassley’s retirement.
First, I want to thank everyone who has donated to the campaign this month and before our end-of-year deadline. These deadlines are real. The ‘health’ of the campaign is a function of how well we attract donors so that we may make payroll, set aside advertising money, and invest in the ground game to get out the vote. I am confident that this will not only be a competitive race, but that we will be victorious because of supporters like you. Thank you for your generosity.
Last week, we made stops in Union and Jasper Counties at their monthly meetings where I spoke and answered questions. Yes, I enjoy the question-and-answer sessions. They help you connect with how I think about things and they help me understand the issues most important to you. You can read more about our stop in Creston [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40780634/325915139/-328208428?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjI3ZGI5Mi1mMTc3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BG47oZkGLOneu3ZQtDGPlooOvSPLyj2F068iVuBPKQk=&emci=0357e0dd-0777-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=6f27db92-f177-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=6371843). We were also able to check in with the Johnston Area Democrats and joined numerous county parties across the state via evening Zoom sessions.
If your County party is holding any upcoming events or if you are interested in hosting a fundraiser or a meet and greet, please email us at [info@frankenforiowa.org](mailto:info@frankenforiowa.org).
We've also been sitting down with local and national press to discuss my campaign. In case you missed it, check out the [Iowa Starting Line](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40780635/325915140/-1854182710?fbclid=IwAR3XNs4ppfJ7xmth9wi1LjtntxchwoDiBuflgezoyts26A2UlAXOTmptspo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjI3ZGI5Mi1mMTc3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BG47oZkGLOneu3ZQtDGPlooOvSPLyj2F068iVuBPKQk=&emci=0357e0dd-0777-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=6f27db92-f177-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=6371843) article where I shared my thoughts on the somber anniversary of the January 6th insurrection at the U.S. Capitol.
I also had the opportunity to sit down with Nick Hayen of the Oriental Express podcast to talk about how foreign policy impacts the lives of everyday Iowans. [Listen to the full interview here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40780636/325915141/-492521599?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjI3ZGI5Mi1mMTc3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BG47oZkGLOneu3ZQtDGPlooOvSPLyj2F068iVuBPKQk=&emci=0357e0dd-0777-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=6f27db92-f177-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=6371843).
If you are interested in writing a letter to the editor in support of this campaign, please email [press@frankenforiowa.org](mailto:press@frankenforiowa.org), and our team will help get your letter published. And thank you for being part of this statewide grassroots campaign.
The endorsements just keep a’coming. We recently added State Senators Jackie Smith and Herman Quirmbach, State Representatives Sharon Steckman and Steve Hansen, and Linn County Supervisors Ben Rogers and Stacey Walker to our growing list of endorsers.
And today, we celebrated the life and legacy of Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr.
Yet, if Senator Chuck Grassley had his way back in 1983, we would not be making the connection of Dr. King’s message and today’s assault on voting rights in dozens of states. Grassley is one of only two sitting senators who voted against then-President Reagan from making Martin Luther King, Jr. Day a federal holiday.
We cannot allow lifetime politicians, like Senator Grassley, to undo the work of Dr. King. No one wants the Jim Crow 2.0-type laws the Republicans are pushing on entire sectors of society. As your Senator, I trust the Freedom to Vote Act and the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act will solidify Dr. King’s legacy.
In closing, below is a list of upcoming events. Yes, you are invited to any event you desire; we’d enjoy seeing you. If you ever have questions or want to invite the Admiral or a staff representative to an upcoming event, please email us at [info@frankenforiowa.org](mailto:info@frankenforiowa.org)!

If we’re going to take on Big Pharma, rein in Wall Street, address the climate crisis, and actually pass progressive legislation, we must protect (and expand!) our Democratic majority in the Senate. That starts with defeating Chuck Grassley and turning Iowa blue this November.
Again, I am so grateful to have each and every one of you on the team. Let’s get this done!
Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.)
[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40780637/325915142/-42398318?refcode=em20220117pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjI3ZGI5Mi1mMTc3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BG47oZkGLOneu3ZQtDGPlooOvSPLyj2F068iVuBPKQk=)
Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc
Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc
PO Box 13401
Des Moines, IA 50310
United States
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/0357e0dd-0777-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442/6f27db92-f177-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjI3ZGI5Mi1mMTc3LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BG47oZkGLOneu3ZQtDGPlooOvSPLyj2F068iVuBPKQk=&id=108479969).

VICE ADMIRAL FRANKEN (RET) IS A FORMER MEMBER OF THE U.S. NAVY. USE OF HIS MILITARY RANK, JOB TITLES, AND PHOTOGRAPHS IN UNIFORM DOES NOT IMPLY ENDORSEMENT FROM THE DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE.

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Be one of the first
body:
I hope you’re having a great day so far.
_Sponsored message_
| | | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4el231hfknvve65cmc75rbca9c2eindh95f9bv0_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c5hm2o32chh2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztmsa1i001r8rb7eg5ksrq068ddhbr9qkcjnegvo_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c5hm2o32chh2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0l75tims3h6d6mea02kn1neva9u3mipk74h6sao_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c5hm2o32chh2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844
---
---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Trumptrainnews, [please use this preferences page](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/prefs/9z2zir35ebjgv97gbu8llfk2cfgprjcq1r84sh9564g).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhkeggo4o5mnen00pr61f22d23q42n82go6auqhg_rp22sh2s8i66ob2c5hm2o32chh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Mo Brooks
subject: MAGA Mo Monday
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE MO BROOKS FOR SENATE COMMITTEE
body:
Happy MAGA Mo Monday! Only 127 days until Primary Election Day on May 24.

| | To keep receiving updates from my campaign, please add us to your address book.
---
[](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=O2VuetiQea1aep2z7TECUy6SeOo3fSqjV85jUBNqUYg&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=maga_mo_monday_1_17_2&n=1)
---

| Happy **MAGA Mo Monday** Peter! We're only 127 days from Primary Election Day on May 24th. Make sure you stay up to date with all the latest at [mobrooks.com](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=O2VuetiQea1aep2z7TECUy6SeOo3fSqjV85jUBNqUYg&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=maga_mo_monday_1_17_2&n=2). **News of the Week** On Friday, I officially qualified with the Alabama Republican Party to be on the ballot to be your next United States Senator. Check out the video[ HERE](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=JgIBoJDRsS4q5gIGXkALnWZqTyXiz5pS-AR4WBPX964&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=maga_mo_monday_1_17_2&n=3)! America needs tested fighters with a proven record of standing with President Trump and the MAGA agenda. As the ONLY America First candidate in this race, I offer Alabama a choice between a proven conservative or what America can’t afford: yet another unreliable Liz Cheney or John McCain RINO. I look forward to seeing Alabamians on the trail soon, and especially look forward to earning your vote on May 24. **Week in Washington** This week, Socialist Democrats in Congress made it clear: they are going to use the new year as an excuse to push their far-left agenda before we toss them out of power in November. Their latest attempt this week was to include amnesty for millions of illegal aliens in a bill that would fund NASA. I voted NO. I also voted NO on the Socialist’s “Voter Fraud and Election Theft Enhancement Act”, a bill that strips election safeguards but has been pushed as a “voting rights” bill. Our Republic cannot survive without fair and honest elections. That’s not possible without strong Republicans like me fighting for election integrity and determined to Fix 2020. **Next Week** Next week, I’ll be back in Washington, DC for another week of Congress in session. It is imperative that we continue to show up to do our jobs of fighting back against the radical Socialist agenda. I will be there, ready to fight. Tonight (Monday), I will be joining a Facebook Live with Alabama Stands, a group started by my daughter Chelsie dedicated to fighting anti-American, dictatorial mandates in Alabama. You can watch on their Facebook page [HERE](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sAbiimTwRd6ssr23ZzK-qLZfZLlX7KqycQf0xvnsc8K&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=maga_mo_monday_1_17_2&n=4). I will also be making in person, in-state stops in Madison and Walker counties. I hope to see you there! **In the News** This week, I introduced my Local Control Act in Congress that would allow State and local officials to refuse to accept illegal aliens from being relocated into their communities. Joe Biden and his Administration have made clear that they will not follow our laws. We must ensure that local governments can enforce the law and keep their communities safe. See Breitbart’s exclusive on my bill[ HERE](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=s24IZE3rULlhCWzRMLn9n-lEXwrx_CK0sP5OiO-VcvotDnkT5jZnAF0vPPGVAzuU86tMrW-MoohDnxptHame_z9zMazSrw_kNflYNKTIZZg0T2kWQGiWvvSZ0DHl-ngaw8hAhJGtML5kGZjCmGA6vHQ8nigTlCKgYHSuU264-VHDrSZY9O6zuPPiDN3hQMhzFkNl2cr1WDnNFO5EtZm1dc63V3BPrsk2JM1Q9pEFwZM&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=maga_mo_monday_1_17_2&n=5). ******Get Involved** This campaign is powered by you. Conservative grassroots leaders across Alabama are the backbone of this campaign. If you haven't signed up to volunteer, you can do so[ HERE](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=hvw5smsGZmC0zsVkF6hKG4VT3iyu91onNSLG8ZGGFleveBv8QA-CfxJ-FwPOFlxZ&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=maga_mo_monday_1_17_2&n=6)! If you know someone looking to intern, or if you want to get more involved, email the team at info@mobrooks.com so we can connect. **Pictures of the Week** Campaign Co-Chair Terry Lathan met with some great patriots at the Monroe County GOP Meeting in Excel. Thanks for standing in for me while I’m in Washington, Terry! I officially qualified to be on the Republican ballot for US Senate!
###
Some of my great campaign volunteers, Carl and Ramona Hastings and Pete Dobbs, handing out campaign yard signs in Cullman. We have the best volunteers! Be sure to check out all of our posts from last week and be sure to like us, follow us and most importantly SHARE us on[ Facebook](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sJAQfbjrgl12zjz4yECp3EspAYwyHliJnJgvrx2-6Fd&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=maga_mo_monday_1_17_2&n=7),[ Twitter](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TvQpzdP2h-MkR1RgQ68Ld6g&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=maga_mo_monday_1_17_2&n=8), [GETTR](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=9zp-qDZJxKJVUKiD6t2SH1K76vrY-7l5rg_tQBNbqtJYYnw1cnhvuOyPPsq9Om-8&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=maga_mo_monday_1_17_2&n=9), and[ Instagram](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73ywFhIE26WWSjD3TNoGUDBzjurmiCr1IGU1y66ajEMFQdM3N4Eq0EkGZlk8wprVldYQ&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=maga_mo_monday_1_17_2&n=10). **Endorsement of the Week** **** “I’m happy to endorse my friend Mo Brooks for the U.S. Senate. Mo has proven time and time again he will stand up for liberty and do what he thinks is right. He will join me in fighting to lower spending, cut the size and power of government, curtail foreign aid, and stop our endless wars overseas. Mo will stand for the Bill of Rights and against the entrenched bipartisan power and big spenders in the Senate just as he has done in the House.” Have a great week and see you on the trail soon,
Mo P.S. The establishment is terrified of me, because I will never work for special interests, I will only work for you. I'm never going to support cheap foreign labor and I don't support open borders, which is why they're doing all they can to stop our campaign. [Can you chip in $10 today to stand up to the open-borders special interest groups who are funding my opponent? ](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7Rm-mUEavjjWvnh57s05qGjY8y_a_Ds7Kkn0Mv9gLhQPqQ&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=maga_mo_monday_1_17_2&n=11)
---

---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=maga_mo_monday_1_17_2&n=12).
---
**SEND A PROVEN CONSERVATIVE LEADER TO THE SENATE**
Mo Brooks for Senate Committee
P.O. Box 4678 Huntsville, AL 35815
PAID FOR BY THE MO BROOKS FOR SENATE COMMITTEE

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220113_tf_redistrictFWD [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220113_tf_redistrictFWD][https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88906/images/The_Atlanta_Journal-Constitution_logo.svg.png] 'Sneak attack': New map pairs Greene's district with outraged Cobb residentsDid you see the note Marcus sent earlier this week?
The newly-approved district maps make Marjorie Taylor Greene's seat MUCH more competitive.
Our team is working around-the-clock to reach new voters in the district to tell them about Democrat Marcus Flowers. This voter outreach will be CRUCIAL to us winning in November. So if you can, click here to fund our get-out-the-vote operation. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220113_tf_redistrictFWD]
---- Begin forwarded message ----
From: Marcus Flowers <info@marcusforgeorgia.com>
Subject: Marjorie Taylor Greene's district just got more competitive
Sent on Tuesday, January 11, 2022 at 3:05 p.m.
Team,
Did you know that the Georgia State Legislature passed a map that is going to make Marjorie Taylor Greene’s district SIGNIFICANTLY more Democratic? This means my campaign for Congress now has an even better chance to flip this district.
These new district lines mean that thousands of new Democratic and undecided voters are now going to be in play -- and we’re launching a bold new initiative to reach these voters wherever they are. If we’re successful, we WILL flip this seat and defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene.
We can’t let this opportunity go to waste. Will you chip in to my campaign today to ensure that we have the resources to reach these new voters, defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene, and restore sanity to Congress? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220113_tf_redistrictFWD]
DONATE NOW » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220113_tf_redistrictFWD]
This is a huge momentum boost for our campaign, and I know that we can get this done.
Talk soon,
Marcus Flowers
Paid for by Marcus for Georgia
Marcus for Georgia
PO Box 725
Bremen, GA 30110
United States

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lawson for Congress]( "Paid for by Lawson for Congress")
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/7624a85ec1b2/one-week-in-5394879?e=fc83fb200d)
---
| |
---
| **Team Lawson is excited to share our 2021 financial highlights as released in our press release this afternoon:**
---
| [Jeanine Lawson ends 2021 strong, full steam ahead to #TakeBackVA10!](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=b7af249db9&e=fc83fb200d "Jeanine Lawson ends 2021 strong, full steam ahead to #TakeBackVA10!")
---
| The Lawson for Congress campaign ended the year with $373,000 cash on hand (COH) putting Jeanine Lawson in a strong position to secure the Republican nomination and move on to defeating Jennifer Wexton this November and retiring Nancy Pelosi once and for all.
---
| [Let's Fire Nancy Pelosi & Her Rubber Stamp Jennifer Wexton](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=14fa6efb29&e=fc83fb200d "Let's Fire Nancy Pelosi & Her Rubber Stamp Jennifer Wexton")
---
| Lawson raised over $530,000 in her first six months on the campaign trail despite a litany of redistricting maps. She is unwavering in her commitment to win and bring common sense leadership back to Virginia’s 10th Congressional District. Her 20+ years of service to the Republican Party of Virginia, her solid conservative voting record on the Prince William County Board of Supervisors for the last seven years, and her strong campaign apparatus have the attention of many stalwart conservative leaders: House Republican Conference Chair, Congresswoman Elise Stefanik, former Virginia Governor Bob McDonnell, former Virginia Attorney General Ken Cuccinelli, former Virginia Delegate Tim Hugo and Delegate Nick Freitas, Penny Nance, President & CEO of Concerned Women for America, as well as the pro-liberty organization FreedomWorks for America PAC.
---
| [Join Team Lawson Today!](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=02481169aa&e=fc83fb200d "Join Team Lawson Today!")
---
| That momentum is just a start, but Jennifer Wexton and her dark money liberal allies are ready to spend millions to keep the seat. Your continued support is critical to push back against their agenda.
---
| [Donate $5 Today](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=2af24c3f77&e=fc83fb200d "Donate $5 Today")
---
| [Donate $10 Today](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=43814fd554&e=fc83fb200d "Donate $10 Today")
---
| [Donate $25 Today](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=2682c90856&e=fc83fb200d "Donate $25 Today")
---
| [Donate $50 Today](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=5e78269d3f&e=fc83fb200d "Donate $50 Today")
---
| [Donate $100 Today](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=c7cc9fb2a7&e=fc83fb200d "Donate $100 Today")
---
| _Jeanine Lawson said:_
“We have taken back Virginia, now’s the time we take back Congress! Locally, we have seen a need for reform. Where woke schools have pushed a toxic political agenda in the classroom, Governor Glenn Youngkin will return Virginia schools to teaching students how to think, not what to think. Where soft on crime commonwealth attorneys have failed parents and citizens, Virginia Attorney General Jason Miyares will ensure we keep our families safe. Congresswoman Jennifer Wexton has failed to place families and public safety first while remaining silent on the scandals our Republican ticket took on. The 10th District deserves better than Jennifer Wexton’s inaction. Those concerned about the safety of our children deserve better, and hardworking Virginians deserve better than her pushing higher utility bills and taxes on our families. We unseated the radicals who had taken over Richmond, and this November we will take back Congress and defeat Jennifer Wexton.”
---
| But the work is not finished. In fact, we're just getting started. If you'd like to join Team Lawson in taking back Virginia's 10th Congressional District, sign up to volunteer today[ here.](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=a9a409f7e9&e=fc83fb200d)

Thank you for all of your unwavering support. We're looking forward to working with YOU to #TakeBackVA10!

\-- Team Lawson

name: By 10 AM tomorrow
subject: To: President Joe Biden
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Sending our thanks >>
| Team: With the one year anniversary of President Biden’s inauguration coming soon, we need to reach out and show our gratitude.

**He has shown such poise and leadership this year while saving our country from a historic pandemic, and repairing the damage caused by Donald Trump.**

But despite all his accomplishments, he is being mercilessly attacked by far-right agitators who only want to destroy his accomplishments. [So we’re sending a letter to share our thanks for all of President Biden’s hard work during his first year in office. We’re sending this letter tomorrow at 10 AM SHARP to make sure it reaches him before the 20th. SIGN NOW, Friend! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5026?t=7&akid=1127%2E878179%2ERmmIHZ) | [Donate $1 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5027?t=9&akid=1127%2E878179%2ERmmIHZ)
---
**TO:** President Joe Biden
**FROM:** A Grateful American
**RE:** HAPPY ONE YEAR!

**We cannot begin to tell you the sense of relief we felt one year ago today, watching you take the presidential oath of office.**

It has been so wonderful to see civility return to the Oval Office and to _finally_ have a President that is willing to fight for working folks and deliver the change we’ve been crying out for over the last four years.

**And my goodness have you delivered on your campaign promises! From the historic American Rescue Plan, to the Bipartisan Infrastructure Bill, to leading an unprecedented economic recovery – we’re SO grateful!**

**But I know that despite your accomplishments, you continuously face unhinged attacks from disgraceful MAGA Republicans.**

[I hope you know that there are MILLIONS of us across the country that stand with you. That’s why I’m signing this card and chipping in $1 to Voter Protection Project to show that we support you and your administration SO much. »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5027?t=11&akid=1127%2E878179%2ERmmIHZ) | [Donate $1 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5027?t=13&akid=1127%2E878179%2ERmmIHZ)
---
I am AMAZED at all you have been able to do for the American people in just your first year as President.

_Joe, you've led us through a pandemic, a massive economic recovery, sharp political division, and SAVED our Democracy from the brink of peril._

[Congratulations on such a successful first year of your presidency. We know that next year will be even more successful thanks to your leadership! Thank you, thank you, thank you! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5027?t=15&akid=1127%2E878179%2ERmmIHZ)
Regards,

**_xx A Grateful American_**
[Donate $1 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5027?t=17&akid=1127%2E878179%2ERmmIHZ)
---
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=1127%2E878179%2ERmmIHZ). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=1127%2E878179%2ERmmIHZ).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1127%2E878179%2ERmmIHZ) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=18&akid=1127%2E878179%2ERmmIHZ). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=1127%2E878179%2ERmmIHZ)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=1127%2E878179%2ERmmIHZ)

Peter,
**Martin Luther King committed his whole life to bring people together and now the Democrats are undoing everything that he fought to improve in our world. He didn't want special rights, special treatment, and Critical Race Theory, he wanted everyone to be treated equally and I'm living proof that he achieved his goal.**

"Our lives begin to end the day we become silent about things that matter." **This is why I'm running for Congress.**

[**In honor of Martin Luther King day, I hope you will take a stand against the race-hustling left with me by sending in just $1 to help elect California's FIRST black Republican female to the House.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c6531f72919e4a5e834d7980c761ac76&_e=azUAPHhpX5HafiQQCO9ytKwz8WKKWzrkyq7bsRHhpaM7YTXe-ayIrCo8pKggg3Mm5zbvBq3PBeakItVOmfhNSCw85doWMCMgHUKxsvfCEcb0IaSKDnAb0DGHUe-5IK8heDbBD1nFvhb5izOxRC0celhzUwEmqI3XVp1rgCYZ2ly6k3DuPcQtPMlbRzK6Q6GbgCSpRogaZuFJKYkaXia7e2z7JbrKPAwePjHSZM7oNWSQ92schX03yd5FeYw_W29s53mP-k4x7iacn2RSx5stkbxsgNwjZP1scrNZp_z-X7Mo6BZ2VMOS9Id6t5KLWB4t3RCH4sA0nFh97QI5rXUc8_NvkVHeF9SvMYmQBKaXvNRb0NIsV4n-FAqQQKQHOmSkEvq8IiW37S_Gd_W4BeDxPlZ39VbDbp4u0mQUlOvVai6jh6mwxSx0gq4GjunQh7xS)

| Friend, -- I’m sorry for bothering you so abruptly on a Sunday, but you’ll understand why I had to reach out in just a moment.
---
Tonight at 11:59 P.M. is the mid-month deadline – _and our FIRST fundraising deadline of 2022_ – but as it stands, we’re still $8,605 SHORT.

**To make matters worse, news just broke that Tony Evers has amassed $10.5 million in cash on hand to lie, attack, and smear our campaign just as we kick off the election year.**

clean_body: Our first fundraising deadline of the election year is tonight, but we’re coming up short. | Friend, -- I’m sorry for bothering you so abruptly on a Sunday, but you’ll understand why I had to reach out in just a moment. Tonight at 11:59 P.M. is the mid-month deadline – and our FIRST fundraising deadline of 2022 – but as it stands, we’re still $8,605 SHORT. To make matters worse, news just broke that Tony Evers has amassed $10.5 million in cash on hand to lie, attack, and smear our campaign just as we kick off the election year. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Rebecca Kleefisch Date: Fri, Jan 14, 2021 Subject: BREAKING: Evers’ war chest To: dpwillis67@gmail.com BREAKING: Friend – this is not the news I was hoping to have to share with you as we approach our first mid-month deadline of the election year. But while Tony Evers is sitting on a war chest of $10.5 MILLION to attack us, we’re still trying to raise the $19,355 we need to meet Sunday’s mid-month deadline. Democrats like Tony Evers believe they can buy elections. But what the radical Left continues to underestimate year after year is the collective power and determination of grassroots patriots like YOU, Friend. Together, as one grassroots movement, we will FIRE Tony Evers this November and take back Wisconsin for conservatives. name: Wes Moore
subject: Doing what is commendable is not enough
body:
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-email-jan2022?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220115Momentum_tw_60da_xx_hdr][https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90457/images/WES-Logo_Running-Mate.png] [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-email-jan2022?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220115Momentum_tw_60da_xx_hdr]
Friend,
When I served as CEO of one of the largest anti-poverty nonprofits in the United States, a quote from Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. sat on my desk.
“Philanthropy is commendable,” it read. “But it must not cause the philanthropist to overlook the circumstances of economic injustice which make philanthropy necessary.”
Dr. King’s timeless words helped to serve as a lodestar to guide my focus as we raised and invested more than $600 million in effective anti-poverty programs, including right here in Maryland. Our work to expand economic opportunity was commendable, and I am proud of the work we did to invest in families being affected by COVID-19, increase access to education, build workforce development mechanisms, and more.
One of my first actions as CEO was to create the first public policy department in the organization’s 30-year history, because I knew we could never be content with our individual impacts, we must work to reform systems that hold too many working families back. That policy department fought to expand the child tax credit, which fundamentally changed the landscape of child poverty in the United States and provided opportunity to millions of families.
That commitment to address economic injustice is now driving our grassroots campaign for Maryland Governor.
We must address the longstanding systems that hold people back and work together to create generational change to make sure every Marylander has the opportunity to succeed.
This is why elections matter.
I know this firsthand. I was born in Maryland, and watched my father die when I was 3 years old after he didn’t receive the healthcare he needed. I watched my mother struggle as a single mom and not find a job that paid her benefits until I was fourteen. That job was at the Annie E. Casey Foundation in Baltimore.
Today is not a celebration, it is a reminder. There is still much work to be done to make good on Dr. King's dream by making it within reach for our families and communities, our daughters and sons, our most vulnerable and most neglected.
We all have a critical role to play in creating progress – especially our government and its leadership.
This campaign has built a grassroots coalition on a promise of addressing the realities families face everyday – increasing work, wages, and wealth – with bold policies, leading and governing with integrity, and leaving no Marylander behind.
As we reflect on Dr. King’s legacy today, let us also remember his message that doing what is commendable is not enough. Removing the barriers to justice is our life’s work. Not just today, but every day.
Elevate,
Wes
Wes Moore is a combat veteran, a former small business owner, and the former CEO of a leading non-profit. Wes believes no matter where you start in life, you deserve an equal opportunity to succeed. He’s running to become Governor of Maryland and flip this state blue for the first time in 8 years. And we need your help to do it.
Contribute [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-email-jan2022?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220115Momentum_tw_60da_xx_ftr]
Use of military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense.
https://www.facebook.com/iamwesmoore [https://www.facebook.com/iamwesmoore] https://twitter.com/iamwesmoore [https://twitter.com/iamwesmoore] https://www.instagram.com/iamwesmoore/ [https://www.instagram.com/iamwesmoore/]
www.WesMoore.com [https://wesmoore.com]
By Authority: Wes Moore for Maryland, Mary Tydings, Treasurer
Wes Moore for Maryland
PO Box 50123
Baltimore, MD 21211
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/fc51d005-fe77-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442/bb4549c3-0178-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjQ1NDljMy0wMTc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CleccOWvAveQ9hH06DwBbIVCLWcafNn0pvoCtA62PJA=&id=128050176 .

subject: Join Steve Forbes and me on February 10th!
body:
This is one event you won't want to miss... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/cashaforcongress/forbes-1?e=ade10d3dbe)

| Peter,

I'm excited to announce that Steve Forbes, the CEO of Forbes Media and former presidential candidate, has joined our team and will be appearing at an event for our team on February 10th.

It's clear that national Republicans have our district on the map. I hope you'll join the fight on February 10th with this special event.

Reserve your spot by purchasing tickets at this link:[ https://secure.winred.com/casha-for-congress/e021022](https://cashaforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=50a6a6c04812360fd0aebd140&id=7b46e80de0&e=ade10d3dbe)

See you on the 10th!

name: Steven Olikara
subject: Putting the King Philosophy into Action
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Olikara for Senate
body:
I hope you are having a happy and meaningful MLK Day. As we take a moment to honor Dr. King’s legacy... [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40781520/325942060/1375102342?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDgwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODQwMDc5Yi0wNjc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O1QgLdbNocGhIfAc2Oeiko9CiTIZHOVn1Mqhu9doXdQ=&emci=e0c7b6a0-e177-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=f840079b-0678-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=26536248) Dear Peter,
I hope you are having a happy and meaningful MLK Day. As we take a moment to honor Dr. King’s legacy, let's also reflect on Dr. King’s methods of making change and how we can all take action in the year ahead. The King Philosophy of change reflects these methods and is more relevant than ever. The way that Dr. King built diverse coalitions to advance human rights, justice, and opportunity should inspire us all. I’ve spent years studying this approach—it helped spark the organization I founded, the Millennial Action Project, and this campaign for the U.S. Senate. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40781521/325942061/1821660561?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDgwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODQwMDc5Yi0wNjc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O1QgLdbNocGhIfAc2Oeiko9CiTIZHOVn1Mqhu9doXdQ=&emci=e0c7b6a0-e177-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=f840079b-0678-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=26536248) _Steven[discussing Dr. King's impact with Carthage College students](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40781522/325942062/1821660561?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDgwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODQwMDc5Yi0wNjc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O1QgLdbNocGhIfAc2Oeiko9CiTIZHOVn1Mqhu9doXdQ=&emci=e0c7b6a0-e177-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=f840079b-0678-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=26536248)_ A couple of years ago, I had the honor of hosting Martin Luther King III at a conference of young legislators. [During the conversation, we broke down the ‘6 Steps of the King Philosophy,](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40781523/325942063/1627992337?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDgwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODQwMDc5Yi0wNjc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O1QgLdbNocGhIfAc2Oeiko9CiTIZHOVn1Mqhu9doXdQ=&emci=e0c7b6a0-e177-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=f840079b-0678-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=26536248)’ and I wanted to share it with you. I believe it’s a potent roadmap for creating change—from our local communities to the U.S Senate.
1. Be deliberate in gathering all the facts
2. Educate your community
3. Strategize your path to change
4. Negotiate what you aim to achieve
5. Engage in direct action
6. Reconcile your differences

You can learn more about the King Philosophy [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40781524/325942064/1637927875?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDgwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODQwMDc5Yi0wNjc4LWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O1QgLdbNocGhIfAc2Oeiko9CiTIZHOVn1Mqhu9doXdQ=&emci=e0c7b6a0-e177-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=f840079b-0678-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=26536248). By taking these steps, we will be able to move legislation on civil rights, economic opportunity for all, voting rights, and more. In solidarity, Steven | |
---

clean_body: I hope you are having a happy and meaningful MLK Day. As we take a moment to honor Dr. King’s legacy... Dear Peter, I hope you are having a happy and meaningful MLK Day. As we take a moment to honor Dr. King’s legacy, let's also reflect on Dr. King’s methods of making change and how we can all take action in the year ahead. The King Philosophy of change reflects these methods and is more relevant than ever. The way that Dr. King built diverse coalitions to advance human rights, justice, and opportunity should inspire us all. I’ve spent years studying this approach—it helped spark the organization I founded, the Millennial Action Project, and this campaign for the U.S. Senate. Steven A couple of years ago, I had the honor of hosting Martin Luther King III at a conference of young legislators. ’ and I wanted to share it with you. I believe it’s a potent roadmap for creating change—from our local communities to the U.S Senate. 1. Be deliberate in gathering all the facts 2. Educate your community 3. Strategize your path to change 4. Negotiate what you aim to achieve 5. Engage in direct action 6. Reconcile your differences You can learn more about the King Philosophy . By taking these steps, we will be able to move legislation on civil rights, economic opportunity for all, voting rights, and more. In solidarity, Steven | | For too long, powerful forces have divided us against each other and left our most vulnerable communities behind. Help us build a new, more inclusive, and compassionate path forward for Wisconsin and our country, one that championsdignity for all. = | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Olikara for Senate P.O. name: Laura Loomer
subject: Dems Steal Elections as Republicans Sleep
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
body:
This is insane . . .
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/XWkJ13hWwOjI892TgKaThqRg/GqSsnSxWqO1KGz6uX88XNg)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/XWkJ13hWwOjI892TgKaThqRg/GqSsnSxWqO1KGz6uX88XNg) This is insane . . .

On Thursday, Democrats introduced a bill to extend NASA's leasing authority . . . at least that's what the title and summary of the bill implied.

The bill is called the "NASA Enhanced Use Leasing Extension Act of 2021" or H.R. 5746.

**In reality, this is a bill that federalizes our elections, stripping states' rights on Voter ID laws, allowing ballot harvesting, and allowing non-citizens to vote.**

Oh, and it also implements a 6 to 1 public financing of federal campaigns via taxpayer dollars.

**And of course, it passed the Communist-Controlled House of Representatives.**

Nine Republicans didn't even bother to cast a vote . . . **including my RINO opponent, Do-Nothing Daniel Webster**.

Just like he skipped the vote on the second impeachment of President Trump and he skipped the vote on a number of other vital bills, **Do-Nothing Dan did ABSOLUTELY NOTHING to stop the Democrat Party 's attempt to completely hijack and federalize our elections**.

Make no mistake, the Democrat's goal in passing this legislation is to ensure that Republicans can never get elected to any federal position, EVER AGAIN!

**In other words, the Democrats want to be in control FOREVER!** | [**FIGHT BACK**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/XWkJ13hWwOjI892TgKaThqRg/GqSsnSxWqO1KGz6uX88XNg)
---

There's a reason why Dan Webster is called Do-Nothing Dan. He has earned his nickname . . . and it's the reason why I'm going to replace him in Congress. [**Help me do that today by backing my campaign with your most generous donation.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/XWkJ13hWwOjI892TgKaThqRg/GqSsnSxWqO1KGz6uX88XNg)

This is the SECOND time that Democrats have actively deceived the American people by hiding horrible, unconstitutional legislation in broader bills that are intentionally off topic and erroneously named.

**And it 's the SECOND time that they have gotten away with it!**

Late last year, Democrats passed Red Flag laws for members of the military!

MANY Republicans voted for it, only to be forced to admit later that they "didn't get a chance to read the bill."
This is absolutely absurd!

We need better leaders in Congress. We need hard-working fighters who will not only READ THE BILLS, but will fight like hell to expose and combat the Communist agenda that is being hidden within all of these bills.

And as a conservative, investigative journalist, that's exactly the type of work I've been doing for years.

I'm a proven EXPERT at exposing corruption, fraud and abuse.

Now, I want to take my investigative skills to Washington!

[**Help me expose Congress by supporting my campaign today.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/XWkJ13hWwOjI892TgKaThqRg/GqSsnSxWqO1KGz6uX88XNg)

Thanks so much for all you do.

Sincerely,

Laura Loomer
[**DONATE NOW**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/XWkJ13hWwOjI892TgKaThqRg/GqSsnSxWqO1KGz6uX88XNg)

name: Charles Booker
subject: Honoring his legacy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

Today, as we commemorate the legacy of Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr., it’s
important we not only recognize the critical work he did to advance
equality in the United States.

To honor his legacy means to continue fighting for the future he
envisioned.

A future where no one dies because of lack of access to health care. Where
it’s not just the billionaires who have money in their pockets and a
gainful life. Where poverty is a thing of the past. Where the color of
your skin doesn’t determine your chances of encountering violence at the
hands of law enforcement. A future where all of our voices count in our
elections.

But as we’ve seen this week, this future is at risk because Senators like
Rand Paul are proudly using the Jim Crow filibuster to obstruct
legislation like the John Lewis Voting Rights Act and urgently needed
voting rights protections.

This fight is personal for me,
Peter.

A couple of years ago, I stood on the floor of the Kentucky State House
and told a story about my Grandad. When he was growing up in the South,
the poll workers used to make him guess how many beans were in a jar
before they allowed him to vote. And so he didn’t.

The only thing that stopped those Jim Crow voter suppression laws was the
Voting Rights Act of 1965. But ever since the Supreme Court gutted it in
2013, we’ve seen the same sort of attempts to undermine our ability to be
heard at the ballot box.

clean_body: [1]Charles Booker Peter, Today, as we commemorate the legacy of Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr., it’s important we not only recognize the critical work he did to advance equality in the United States. To honor his legacy means to continue fighting for the future he envisioned. A future where no one dies because of lack of access to health care. Where it’s not just the billionaires who have money in their pockets and a gainful life. Where poverty is a thing of the past. Where the color of your skin doesn’t determine your chances of encountering violence at the hands of law enforcement. A future where all of our voices count in our elections. But as we’ve seen this week, this future is at risk because Senators like Rand Paul are proudly using the Jim Crow filibuster to obstruct legislation like the John Lewis Voting Rights Act and urgently needed voting rights protections. This fight is personal for me, Peter. A couple of years ago, I stood on the floor of the Kentucky State House and told a story about my Grandad. When he was growing up in the South, the poll workers used to make him guess how many beans were in a jar before they allowed him to vote. And so he didn’t. The only thing that stopped those Jim Crow voter suppression laws was the Voting Rights Act of 1965. But ever since the Supreme Court gutted it in 2013, we’ve seen the same sort of attempts to undermine our ability to be heard at the ballot box. So now, we have two choices, Peter: We allow corrupt politicians like Rand Paul to continue to stand in the way of progress. Or we elect a leader who will proudly fight for the change we need to achieve Dr. King’s vision for our country. I know what choice I’m making and I hope you’ll rise up with me this election as we embark in this work. Voting rights for all, no less. Charles P.S. We’re a people-powered campaign. We don’t accept a single cent from corporate PACs or special interests. [ ]If you want to support our work this year to replace Rand Paul and expand our majority in the Senate, even giving $5 makes a huge difference. Thank you. Contribute to Charles Booker:

name: Tom Winter
subject: This work is far from finished
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WINTER FOR MONTANA Winter for Montana
body:
We have a long way to go in order to restore the idea that we are all created equal. | | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhtd7VTKzNjbIIvGoWZoZcVquusCcqVQFdnurTlEZMiYjfNm5zM_GnMmx1YN5OufiawB8ghnZt31GmLqu_VgKCGDWuRsHYL6m06wQJ8XYEEkxnhe8e4ZMz4eOdNQ_6Xcwy7Ckv7COhBIeMz-JY9TaaGrydJ8bgcitClps4aLldTfQAbgUfAewe7thnPfPCNbUbLSHlK7QC0kHINViv84bqj5BL9f8jV7-kDJKHBL-es4f8111JvmB954rhkLASMhBvzZTW1qa9JfRyQVtWUvG2LJoXz5zHjMODTHyNRcEzWFJYskNM-fW60m2c5WQPAztNQ/3is/bw_z7nuoQOegaGGYEh04wg/h0/uuP5jpN6UltZCQecmN0KjKzZMVRr_69F3agvlvU_GxM) Friend:

Today is Martin Luther King Jr. Day – a day to honor and celebrate the legacy of an American hero. His activism and leadership was powerful – he ushered a movement for equality and justice in our country.

And while we celebrate his legacy today, we must take a moment to acknowledge that this work is far from finished. We have a long way to go in order to restore the power of the idea that we are all created equal.

In addition to having these important discussions on MLK Day, we also use today as a National Day of Service to give back to our community and take care of our neighbors.

This last weekend I asked my friends, family, and campaign supporters if they could spare any winter clothes, food, and other supplies to help our unhoused neighbors at the Poverello Center. And in true Montana fashion, they stepped up to help their neighbors who needed it - so much so that I’m having some trouble picking it all up!

[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhtd7VTKzNjbIIvGoWZoZcVquusCcqVQFdnurTlEZMiYjfNm5zM_GnMmx1YN5Oufia4ZWvjCkX312igs6RFcY4OmnBBMqetp3uUIvAsbv9Ogo0kSsMy9bOaathe9A2ZaMDwPFZTP8Gt6yePPZGlalOLxKy9m0KdHjcLLstLaeOOyMGwLt5Vo9zLMNLWqxbhJr0NgSSS6wKOswumXZLiMrJ77b1_jqQHSwWNivgvabQhklqLtSNxVLrgFjN5Y4Pb7uTfVJhdy3pwQGMXJMuRGt0iV_xDuKp0Soi76cYkoA12WGT1tZv4nbSxCBFJhhudadgw/3is/bw_z7nuoQOegaGGYEh04wg/h1/3VYUpN1st49MCjyRGZM6-ARlk6HmwBWL9pM7-CmpBH4)
Montanans always lend a helping hand if a neighbor needs it. Let’s face it, there’s not a lot of us under this great Big Sky, and if we don’t take care of each other, no one will!

And with the spike in COVID cases, coupled with the peak of winter upon us, all these generous donors and I knew our friends at the Poverello Center needed that helping hand today. We were happy to serve.

**Just like Dr. King said, "The time is always right to do what is right." So today, I’m asking you to join me in taking part in the National Day of Service.**

It doesn’t have to be a massive undertaking – whether it's stopping by a shelter or pantry in your community, or simply offering to shovel a neighbor’s sidewalk during the next snow storm, let’s come together as a community to remind each other that we are stronger when we work together.

If you’d like to share what you’ve done for the National Day of Service, I’d love to see it, and I know a lot of your fellow supporters would, too. [**Reply to my tweet so we can see!**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhtd7VTKzNjbIIvGoWZoZcVquusCcqVQFdnurTlEZMiYjfNm5zM_GnMmx1YN5OufiazmOAvSEoufHaH5v0TRDEOYO0Sj4x-D7RTh0uUtZrsUfqLinwS51DN_pGmssXYtBfDrpbLZShm7Uelx6T31H3gXq1xKnK-sMxw_IHakDkY-hwdQfWFu9qN7spZ2gU80ubBfI41QRiZa-kn-m6sI_kVXcMhxiIkL19_wsIgF8VKxRbd8lqNEnN7Ow5bgJGFlevylUIXkPfjelaIewgaM7QKlHvyEY7bxbA3aWJ5_YJXspoe1wCw7RfvYjTcJVZs9B5A/3is/bw_z7nuoQOegaGGYEh04wg/h2/YPBIibgWjnWEs1R1aCNSadyjh1LKkEITZHPz75fZ0zQ)

Thank you,
Tom

PAID FOR BY WINTER FOR MONTANA Winter for Montana
PO Box 1592
Polson, MT
59860
---

Peter, this is huge...
---
A brand-new poll from the Missouri Chamber of Commerce gives us a **_12-point LEAD_** over our next closest challenger. We are running away with this race and the evidence is overwhelming.
---
It’s clear that when it comes to the 1 SEAT needed to FLIP the 50-50 Senate from Kamala’s control, voters don’t want a Soros-backed puppet like our opponent, or another feckless RINO.
---

subject: Big Announcement on Wednesday...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARRETT SOLDANO FOR MICHIGAN
body:
Join us in Lansing this Wednesday, January 19th. | | | [ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=4cb9331f52&e=fe4b890356)
---
|
**This is going to be a HUGE week for our movement, Peter.**

For the past six months, our grassroots warriors have been hammering down & collecting signatures to get our campaign on the Republican Primary ballot.

Every candidate must submit at least 15,000 valid signatures to the state to earn their place on that ballot - _**and I'm excited that our campaign will be the FIRST to do so this Wednesday, January 19th.**_
---
| [ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=51aac17c07&e=fe4b890356)
---
| | | **I'm spending Wednesday in Lansing to take part in 3 big events:**
* I'm walking in the [**Michigan** **March for Life**](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=330c434bc8&e=fe4b890356) , which begins at the Capitol Building Steps at **1:00pm**. I believe that the God-given right to life of all of our babies must be protected and as Governor, I will stand up for the unborn.

* After the March for Life, our movement will be gathering outside the Richard H. Austin Building downtown at **3:00pm to deliver our nominating petitions to the Michigan Secretary of State**

* At **6:30pm** , we will be heading to our **Lansing Meet & Greet** at Tony M's Restaurant and Banquet Center (3420 S Creyts Rd, Lansing, MI)

---
| _"Our lives begin to end the day we become silent about the things that matter" _\- **Martin Luther King Jr.**

**_This campaign is moving full speed ahead Peter, and it time to make our voices heard!_**

_Please join us this Wednesday as we take our movement to the next level._ If you cannot make our petition announcement, we'd love to see you at our Meet & Greet in the evening! **Bring your friends, bring your family, bring your neighbors - and let's take Michigan back!**

The Power of One Leads to the Power of Many,

_Garrett Soldano_
---
|
---
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=bc2e270965&e=fe4b890356 "CONTRIBUTE")
---
| | _P.S. - In the next month, I'm visiting Eaton, Livingston, Roscommon, Oakland, Berrien, Macomb, St. Joseph and Wayne Counties.____[**See our full list of upcoming events here**](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=0dbff05db2&e=fe4b890356)._
---
| | PAID FOR BY GARRETT SOLDANO FOR MICHIGAN
1151 WEST MILHAM AVENUE, UNIT 2546, PORTAGE, MI 49081
---
| Garrett Soldano for Michigan
1151 West Milham Avenue, Unit 2546, Portage, MI 49081

body:
The Left has it all wrong The Left has it all wrong | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ce2b553601814f1d977ed043820a2784&_e=vhxEA2R80aJaxHDlkxPBsnvAif_7xSPn7OIvh3LAScMhUvJn_6wyhx_4b3OBRSx_ZHluJc3QSbkNhAeaKHcrEdOzA2odJYXaAeWNweMpjuTwNr0gFEpTgIK4LXyaIifNFkTei4aKQ6D4YhUcOxvxY_1OKQoUYEGdUD5-XDohubSaQoZJC4E1EUly8ETyY0265u8Eid2OuYeqiq8DiU84DwWEDPwLQg4W19fKCzHR10kN7WhNEqwqB5_JhiBVo2J9vlY32eAkySbtZFLH9bU1GlZ7tAjLy1F9F2ALOc_cU2YsHPSLMec6B_Dzn1KPxzWtXViguJyg-TkaEcmFjHDE9dslOnYqsHPridA0T-EnMuZxFj1GRbn9fd_f5NSf5AORQSil5UjOt0n9tDRABdQjXmRfDQAnTCn44iT-sZiWptvWbOF45Fm-Zb_RNz6yFeE6)

Friend,
**Martin Luther King committed his whole life to bring people together and now the Democrats are undoing everything that he fought to improve in our world. He didn't want special rights, special treatment, and Critical Race Theory, he wanted everyone to be treated equally and I'm living proof that he achieved his goal.**

clean_body: The Left has it all wrong The Left has it all wrong | Friend, Martin Luther King committed his whole life to bring people together and now the Democrats are undoing everything that he fought to improve in our world. He didn't want special rights, special treatment, and Critical Race Theory, he wanted everyone to be treated equally and I'm living proof that he achieved his goal. "Our lives begin to end the day we become silent about things that matter." This is why I'm running for Congress. The Left is praying on the weak minded for their support by promising them the world on a silver platter. Well, as a self-made person and a veteran, I'll be the first to say that's nothing but a dream, and not the kind MLK was talking about. Life isn't easy, winning isn't easy and success doesn't come without work. Why did Martin Luther King advocate for equal education? Because he wanted to allow black Americans like myself the opportunity to make something of themselves. He never said it would be easy. And here's a newsflash for the Left: it's not easy for anyone, no matter your color. If you grow up poor, don't have any interest in school and have no ambition, short of winning the lottery, you're going to stay poor. So, on this MLK day in 2022, help me bring honor to what Martin Luther King really stood for. I'm not asking you to take a knee with me, I'm asking you to stand up with me. We have less than a year until the 2022 Midterm elections and I can show the world that a BLACK CONSERVATIVE can get elected even in one of the most Democrat dominated states. The Left is scared of me because they know I'm loud, outspoken, and will call them on their lies that they've been spoon-feeding to minority communities just to get their votes. Thank you, Aja Smith United States Air Force Veteran Republican for Congress | Aja is a United States Air Force veteran.
